overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from a covered street under an overpass past the Jinguji clothing store, transitioning into the open Corpo Plaza area with its distinctive holographic monument and towering neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: player walks from open intersection into covered walkway beneath overpass structure
player passes under the overpass gantry and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, moving past pedestrians and approaching the Jinguji building

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated 'DATA INC' signage in blue neon
large metal transit structure spanning across the street with yellow accent lighting
tall building with prominent yellow neon trim and vertical lighting strips
dark building with large vertical Japanese characters '神宮寺' in white neon

segments.scene_description: The player begins at a city intersection and walks into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a large overpass structure. The DATA INC building is visible across the street while the Jinguji clothing store appears on the right. Yellow neon accents illuminate the building facades as futuristic vehicles drive past on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street canyon with high-rise buildings

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into brighter daylight conditions
futuristic sports car with glowing accents drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the sidewalk between towering buildings, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
modern street light with attached digital signage display

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into a narrow street canyon flanked by towering skyscrapers. The Jinguji building remains visible on the right while palm trees line the street center. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the sidewalk as various futuristic vehicles pass by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: Corpo Plaza public square with holographic monument

events.description: entering Corpo Plaza as the environment opens into a wide public square
UI notification 'CORPO PLAZA' appears indicating new area discovery

agents.ego_description: walking into the open plaza area, approaching the central holographic monument while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: seated NPC resting on a plaza bench near the planters

entered.detail: circular plaza structure with a large holographic display projecting a rotating human figure on top
massive vertical holographic advertisements covering the facades of distant skyscrapers
large rectangular planters containing trees and greenery arranged along the plaza edge
modern concrete benches integrated with the planter structures

segments.scene_description: The player enters the expansive Corpo Plaza, transitioning from the narrow street to an open public square. A prominent holographic monument stands in the plaza center, projecting a rotating figure above a circular base. The area features landscaped planters with seating, while massive holographic billboards illuminate the distant tower facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into the expansive, neon-lit openness of a corporate plaza. It begins at a city intersection, moving into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass where yellow neon accents highlight the DATA INC building and the Jinguji clothing store. As the camera emerges from the shadows of the overpass, the environment shifts into a narrow street canyon flanked by towering skyscrapers and palm trees, with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles filling the thoroughfare. The scene then opens wide as the player transitions from the confined street into the vast Corpo Plaza, where the architecture gives way to a public square. Finally, the view expands to reveal a rotating holographic monument at the center, surrounded by landscaped planters and massive holographic billboards illuminating the distant tower facades.
